info.name: CredPal FX Trading API
info.description:
Full API collection for the CredPal FX Trading platform.

## Workflow
1. **Register** → saves `verificationToken` automatically
2. **Verify Email** → saves `accessToken` automatically
3. Use authenticated endpoints (wallet, trading, fx, transactions)

## Authentication
All protected endpoints use Bearer token auth. The token is auto-saved from Login and Verify responses.

item.name: Auth

request.description:
Register a new user. Returns a `verificationToken` — check your email/logs for the OTP code.

The `verificationToken` is auto-saved to the environment.

response.name: Register

request.description:
Verify email with the OTP sent during registration. Replace `otp` with the actual code from your email/logs.

The `accessToken` is auto-saved to the environment on success.

Login with email and password. Returns a JWT access token.

The `accessToken` is auto-saved to the environment on success.

Resend a new OTP using the verification token from registration. Returns a new `verificationToken` (the old one is invalidated).

The new `verificationToken` is auto-saved to the environment.

item.description: Authentication endpoints — register, verify email, login, resend OTP.

item.name: Wallet

request.description: Get all wallet balances for the authenticated user. Returns balances for each currency held.

header.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate funding. Auto-generated UUID.

request.description:
Fund your NGN wallet. Amount is in Naira.

Includes an `Idempotency-Key` header (auto-generated UUID) to prevent duplicate transactions.

header.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate funding. Auto-generated UUID.

item.description: Wallet management — view balances and fund your NGN wallet.

item.name: Trading

header.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate trades.

request.description:
Buy foreign currency with NGN. Specify the foreign currency and amount you want to buy.

`recipientWalletId` is optional for BUY transactions.

Example: BUY 100 USD = debit NGN equivalent, credit 100 USD.

header.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate trades.
Unique key to prevent duplicate trades.

request.description:
Sell foreign currency for NGN. Specify the foreign currency and amount you want to sell.

`recipientWalletId` is **required** for SELL transactions.

Example: SELL 50 USD = debit 50 USD, credit NGN equivalent.

header.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate trades.
Unique key to prevent duplicate conversions.

request.description:
Convert between any two currencies (including NGN). Cross-pair conversions bridge through NGN automatically.

Examples:
- USD → EUR (cross-pair)
- NGN → USD (direct)
- GBP → NGN (direct)

header.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate conversions.

item.description: Buy/sell foreign currency against NGN, or convert between any two currencies.

request.description: Get all FX rates with NGN as the base currency. Returns rates for USD, EUR, GBP, and all other supported currencies.
Get the FX rate for a specific currency pair.

item.name: Transactions

request.description: Get paginated transaction history for the authenticated user. Default: page 1, limit 20.

response.name: Get All Transactions

request.description: Get filtered transaction history. All query parameters are optional.
